descriptionText: Jeanneau Sun Odyssey 490: Available Beginning of October 2025The Jeanneau Sun Odyssey 490 For Sale 2019 is a remarkable vessel that embodies the perfect blend of performance, comfort, and elegance. Marketed in pristine condition, it stands ready to embark on new adventures at sea. This yacht's innovative design offers effortless handling and superior sailing capabilities, making it ideal for both avid sailors and those new to the maritime world. With its spacious and intelligently designed interior, the Sun Odyssey 490 provides a luxurious living environment, capable of accommodating friends and family in comfort and style. Its state-of-the-art features and robust build quality ensure a safe, enjoyable, and unforgettable sailing experience. This is an opportunity to own a meticulously maintained, top-tier sailing yacht.Specifications: - Length: 14.85 m - Width: 4.49 m - Draft: 2.24 m - Sleeping capacity: 12 (10 in cabins and 2 when converting the dinette table) - Number of cabins: 5 - Engine power: Yanmar 80 HP - Bathrooms: 3, each with manual toilet pumps and a waste tank - Diesel tank capacity: 240L - Water tank capacity: 640L (2 tanks, 320L each)Interior Features: - Refrigerator - 220V boiler - Gas stove with oven - USB sockets in each cabin - Radio and Bluetooth connectivityExterior Features: - Bimini top and sprayhood - Outdoor shower - Electric windlass - Exterior cushions - Gennaker halyard - Jet thruster - GPS plotter - AutopilotSafety Equipment: - Toolkit - Airhorn - Fire extinguisher - Signal rockets and flares - Black cone and black sphere for signaling - Emergency rudder - Life buoy with LED light and line - Life raft - Life jackets and belts - First aid kitsNavigation Tools: - Torch - Pilot books in Italian, English, German, and French - Hand compass - Flags of France and Corsica - Nautical charts for northern Sardinia and CorsicaSails: - Furling mainsail and self-tacking jib
descriptionHtml:
Jeanneau Sun Odyssey 490: Available Beginning of October 2025

The Jeanneau Sun Odyssey 490 For Sale 2019 is a remarkable vessel that embodies the perfect blend of performance, comfort, and elegance. Marketed in pristine condition, it stands ready to embark on new adventures at sea. This yacht's innovative design offers effortless handling and superior sailing capabilities, making it ideal for both avid sailors and those new to the maritime world. With its spacious and intelligently designed interior, the Sun Odyssey 490 provides a luxurious living environment, capable of accommodating friends and family in comfort and style. Its state-of-the-art features and robust build quality ensure a safe, enjoyable, and unforgettable sailing experience. This is an opportunity to own a meticulously maintained, top-tier sailing yacht.

Specifications:
- Length: 14.85 m
- Width: 4.49 m
- Draft: 2.24 m
- Sleeping capacity: 12 (10 in cabins and 2 when converting the dinette table)
- Number of cabins: 5
- Engine power: Yanmar 80 HP
- Bathrooms: 3, each with manual toilet pumps and a waste tank
- Diesel tank capacity: 240L
- Water tank capacity: 640L (2 tanks, 320L each)

Interior Features:
- Refrigerator
- 220V boiler
- Gas stove with oven
- USB sockets in each cabin
- Radio and Bluetooth connectivity

Exterior Features:
- Bimini top and sprayhood
- Outdoor shower
- Electric windlass
- Exterior cushions
- Gennaker halyard
- Jet thruster
- GPS plotter
- Autopilot

Safety Equipment:
- Toolkit
- Airhorn
- Fire extinguisher
- Signal rockets and flares
- Black cone and black sphere for signaling
- Emergency rudder
- Life buoy with LED light and line
- Life raft
- Life jackets and belts
- First aid kits

Navigation Tools:
- Torch
- Pilot books in Italian, English, German, and French
- Hand compass
- Flags of France and Corsica
- Nautical charts for northern Sardinia and Corsica

Sails:
- Furling mainsail and self-tacking jib
